title: Password Reset and Account Access
text:

Check your internet connection.

Contact the IT Administrator if the issue persists.

Keep your recovery information up to date.

title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) Issues
text:

Never share verification codes.
Update your registered phone number when it changes.
